evidence: spec.stop_conditions.OWNER_GATE: 'Any change to frozen contracts/seeds/KPI after baseline; any real payment, deployment, or user contact'
spec.stop_conditions.ENGINEERING_REQUIRED: 'If a required adapter, schema, or behavioral invariant is missing from commerce-core and blocks the build'
spec.nonclaims: does not prove real payment processing, real film rights, or real filmmaker payout
approval_boundary_present.notes: Both OWNER_GATE and ENGINEERING_REQUIRED stop tokens defined in spec. Approval boundary is explicit.

evidence: spec.kpi_assumptions.primary_kpi: conversion_rate
spec.kpi_assumptions.secondary_kpi: aov
spec.kpi_assumptions.guardrail: refund_rate < 0.15
spec.kpi_assumptions.baseline_cohort: seed=42, user_count=200
success_metric_present.notes: Conversion rate as primary metric, AOV as secondary, refund_rate guardrail. All measurable and frozen.

evidence: spec.problem: 'There is no simple way to pay a filmmaker for a single short film and know the money reaches them directly'
brand.hero_line: 'Be the reason the next one gets made.'
spec.positioning: 'The Patron's Channel — your money reaches the maker, not the platform'
goal_clarity.notes: Goal is sharp and specific: a single-film patronage storefront where money goes directly to the filmmaker. No ambiguity about scope or purpose.

evidence: spec.commerce_behavior.cart: 'single-item (one film per purchase, not a bundle)'
spec.nonclaims: does not prove real payment processing, does not prove real film rights
brand: 'Out of scope by design: search/filter, filmmaker profiles, wishlists, reviews, real auth'
spec.architecture.ui_source: 'docs/atm-415/ui/onereel — port verbatim, no visual changes'
scope_boundaries.notes: Scope is clearly bounded: local Next.js app, synthetic payments, verbatim UI port, no real deployment or real commerce.

evidence: contracts/kpi/formulas.json: conversion_rate, aov, refund_rate formulas frozen
spec.kpi_assumptions.baseline_cohort: seed=42, n=200 — deterministic synthetic cohort
contracts/cohort/seeds.json: governance note on frozen seeds
success_measures.notes: Measurable success: conversion rate as primary, AOV as secondary. Both computed from frozen seed cohort — identical retest possible. Synthetic nonclaim explicit.

evidence: spec.persona.name: 'The filmmaker-patron'
spec.persona.description: 'Viewers who discover indie short filmmakers online and want to financially support them directly'
spec.persona.frustration: 'All-you-can-watch platforms dilute creator payouts to pennies'
brand.voice: 'The maker is the hero, the user is the patron'
target_user.notes: Target user is well-defined: viewer-as-patron who has discovered a filmmaker and wants to support the actual work. Distinct from general streaming consumer.

overall_notes: Intent is fully specified by the locked brand doc and frozen spec. Both stop tokens defined, both hard gates passed. Ready for research stage.
